title: atalantia sessiliflora
intro: Atalantia sessiliflora, also known as the Atalantia fruit or wild orange, is a type of plant native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atalantia sessiliflora include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide protection against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or added to food products.
